test.create_query: CREATE TABLE short_agg_test (time DateTime, path String, hits UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (path, time)
test.query: SELECT time::Date AS d, sum(hits), count() FROM short_agg_test WHERE path = 'nonexistent' GROUP BY d ORDER BY d UNION ALL SELECT time::Date AS d, sum(hits), count() FROM short_agg_test WHERE path = 'nonexistent' GROUP BY d ORDER BY d UNION ALL SELECT time::Date AS d, sum(hits), count() FROM short_agg_test WHERE path = 'nonexistent' GROUP BY d ORDER BY d UNION ALL SELECT time::Date AS d, sum(hits), count() FROM short_agg_test WHERE path = 'nonexistent' GROUP BY d ORDER BY d UNION ALL SELECT time::Date AS d, sum(hits), count() FROM short_agg_test WHERE path = 'nonexistent' GROUP
